metadata.description: Deployment environment (matches the bicepparam files and the deploy workflow).
Short prefix applied to all resource names.
Azure region for all resources. Defaults to the resource group location.
Administrator login for the Azure SQL servers.
Administrator password for the Azure SQL servers. Never committed — injected from the SQL_ADMIN_PASSWORD environment variable at deploy time.
Azure SQL database SKU name (capacity tier identifier, not a monetary value).
ACR SKU name (capacity tier identifier, not a monetary value).
Log Analytics retention in days for the Container Apps environment.
Container image tag applied to frontend, API, and worker images.
Deploy the payment/Stripe worker container app scaffold.
Service Bus SKU tier (Standard required for Dapr topic-based pub/sub).
Dapr pub/sub component name used by application code.
Initial Dapr pub/sub topic for AI analysis queue messages.
Azure region for the managed identity.
Tags applied to all resources in this module.
Name of the user-assigned managed identity.
Azure region for the container registry.
Tags applied to all resources in this module.
Globally unique ACR name (5-50 alphanumeric characters).
ACR SKU name (capacity tier identifier, not a monetary value).
Object IDs granted AcrPull on this registry.
Azure region for the Container Apps environment and Log Analytics.
Tags applied to all resources in this module.
Name of the Log Analytics workspace backing ACA diagnostics.
Name of the Azure Container Apps managed environment.
Log retention period in days.
Azure region for the container app.
Tags applied to the container app.
Name of the container app (lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens).
Resource ID of the shared Container Apps managed environment.
Full container image reference (for example myacr.azurecr.io/vitalnexus-api:latest).
Container CPU cores (for example 0.25).
Container memory (for example 0.5Gi).
Minimum replica count.
Maximum replica count.
Expose HTTP ingress for the container app.
When ingress is enabled, expose the app externally. Set false for internal-only ingress.
Target port for ingress traffic.
User-assigned managed identity resource ID used for ACR pull and runtime access.
ACR login server used for registry authentication via managed identity.
Plain-text environment variables injected into the container.
Container app secrets (referenced by secret-backed environment variables).
Environment variables backed by container app secrets.
Enable the Dapr sidecar for this container app.
Dapr application identifier.
Port the application listens on for Dapr app-channel communication.
Optional HTTP health probe path.

variables.healthProbes: [if(empty(parameters('healthProbePath')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('type', 'Liveness', 'httpGet', createObject('path', parameters('healthProbePath'), 'port', parameters('targetPort'), 'scheme', 'HTTP'), 'initialDelaySeconds', 10, 'periodSeconds', 30), createObject('type', 'Readiness', 'httpGet', createObject('path', parameters('healthProbePath'), 'port', parameters('targetPort'), 'scheme', 'HTTP'), 'initialDelaySeconds', 5, 'periodSeconds', 10)))]

metadata.description: Azure region for the server and its databases.
Tags applied to all resources in this module.
Globally unique name of the SQL logical server (lowercase).
Administrator login for the server.
Administrator password for the server. Never committed — injected at deploy time.
Names of the databases to create on this server.
Database SKU name (capacity tier identifier, not a monetary value).
Allow Azure services (App Service, Functions) to reach the server through the Azure-internal firewall rule.
Azure region for the server and its databases.
Tags applied to all resources in this module.
Globally unique name of the SQL logical server (lowercase).
Administrator login for the server.
Administrator password for the server. Never committed — injected at deploy time.
Names of the databases to create on this server.
Database SKU name (capacity tier identifier, not a monetary value).
Allow Azure services (App Service, Functions) to reach the server through the Azure-internal firewall rule.
Azure region for the storage account.
Tags applied to all resources in this module.
Globally unique storage account name (3-24 chars, lowercase alphanumeric).
Blob containers to create in the account.
Days deleted blobs remain recoverable (supports the no-automatic-deletion principle).
Azure region for the Key Vault.
Tags applied to all resources in this module.
Globally unique Key Vault name (3-24 chars).
Object IDs of managed identities granted the Key Vault Secrets User role.
Azure region for Service Bus resources.
Tags applied to all resources in this module.
Globally unique Service Bus namespace name.
Service Bus SKU tier (Standard required for topics).
Initial Dapr pub/sub topic for AI analysis queue messages.
Name of the existing Key Vault.
Secret name (Key Vault secret identifier).
Secret value to store.
Name of the existing Container Apps managed environment.
Dapr component name used by application code (for example pubsub).
Azure Service Bus connection string for the pub/sub broker.
Dapr application IDs allowed to use this pub/sub component.
